mapper.select: SELECT bbs_oid, bbs_se_cd, use_yn, bbs_nm, upend_fix_yn, prvt_yn, mbr_wrt_yn, prev_next_expsr_yn, cmnt_psblty_yn, ctgry_yn, list_cn_expsr_yn, ctgry_list, file_uld_cnt, file_uld_size, pst_oid_expsr_yn, wrtr_expsr_yn, wrt_dt_expsr_yn, ddln_dt_expsr_yn, atch_file_en_yn, prgrs_stts_expsr_yn, inq_cnt_expsr_yn, srch_use_yn, page_cnt, paging_cnt, img_wdth_cnt, img_vrtc_cnt, bbs_expln, bbs_sub_se_cd, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs WHERE bbs_oid = #{bbsOid}

select tm.bbs_oid, tm.menu_cd, tb.ctgry_list, tb.bbs_se_cd from ${schema}.bbs tb left join ${schema}.menu tm on tb.bbs_oid = tm.bbs_oid where tm.menu_auth_lv = #{menuAuthLv} and tb.bbs_sub_se_cd = #{bbsSubSeCd}

SELECT file_oid, tbl_nm, tbl_oid, orgnl_file_nm, strg_file_nm, strg_file_path, strg_file_cpct, file_type_nm, file_type, thmb_yn, atch_file_seq, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.file WHERE tbl_oid = #{bbsPstOid} AND tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND use_yn = 'Y' AND file_type = 'ATTACHMENT' ORDER BY atch_file_seq ASC

SELECT tbp.bbs_pst_oid, tbp.bbs_oid, tbp.user_oid, tbp.wrtr_nm, tbp.bbs_pst_ttl, tbp.bbs_pst_cn_txt, tbp.ctgry, tbp.ntc_yn, tbp.prvt_pst_yn, tbp.inq_cnt, tbp.like_cnt, tbp.cmnt_cnt, tbp.atch_cnt, IF(CURDATE() >= tbp.bgng_dt AND (tbp.end_dt IS NULL OR tbp.end_dt >= CURDATE()), 'Y', 'N') AS upend_fix_yn, tbp.bgng_dt, tbp.end_dt, tbp.stts, tbp.ddln_dt, tbp.open_yn, tbp.del_yn, tbp.reg_id, tbp.reg_dt, tbp.mdfcn_id, tbp.mdfcn_dt, CASE WHEN tbp.ddln_dt IS NOT NULL AND DATE(tbp.ddln_dt) < DATE(NOW()) THEN '마감' WHEN DATE(tbp.reg_dt) > DATE(NOW()) THEN '예정' WHEN tbp.ddln_dt IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE '진행중' END AS stts_nm, (SELECT CONCAT(tf.strg_file_path, '/', tf.strg_file_nm) FROM ${schema}.file tf WHERE tf.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tf.tbl_oid = tbp.bbs_pst_oid AND tf.use_yn = 'Y' AND tf.thmb_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1) AS thumbnail_path FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst tbp WHERE tbp.del_yn = 'N' AND tbp.open_yn = 'Y' AND tbp.bbs_oid = #{bbsOid} ORDER BY IF(CURDATE() >= tbp.bgng_dt AND (tbp.end_dt IS NULL OR tbp.end_dt >= CURDATE()), 'Y', 'N') DESC, tbp.bbs_pst_oid DESC

SELECT bbs_pst_oid, bbs_oid, user_oid, wrtr_nm, wrtr_pswd, bbs_pst_ttl, bbs_pst_cn, bbs_pst_cn_txt, ctgry, ntc_yn, prvt_pst_yn, inq_cnt, like_cnt, cmnt_cnt, atch_cnt, bgng_dt, end_dt, stts, ddln_dt, up_bbs_pst_oid, reply_lv, reply_seq, open_yn, rcrt_type, del_yn, del_dt, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst WHERE bbs_pst_oid = #{bbsPstOid} AND del_yn = 'N'

SELECT bbs_pst_oid, bbs_oid, user_oid, wrtr_nm, wrtr_pswd, bbs_pst_ttl, bbs_pst_cn, bbs_pst_cn_txt, ctgry, ntc_yn, prvt_pst_yn, inq_cnt, like_cnt, cmnt_cnt, atch_cnt, bgng_dt, end_dt, stts, ddln_dt, up_bbs_pst_oid, reply_lv, reply_seq, open_yn, rcrt_type, del_yn, del_dt, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst WHERE bbs_pst_oid = #{bbsPstOid} AND wrtr_pswd = ${schema}.fn_encrypt_sha1(#{wrtrPswd}) AND del_yn = 'N'

SELECT bbs_pst_oid, bbs_pst_ttl FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND NOW() >= reg_dt AND bbs_pst_oid > #{bbsPstOid} AND bbs_oid = #{bbsOid} AND open_yn = 'Y' AND ( bgng_dt IS NULL OR bgng_dt <= CURDATE() )
AND ( end_dt IS NULL OR end_dt >= CURDATE() )
ORDER BY bbs_pst_oid ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT bbs_pst_oid, bbs_pst_ttl FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND NOW() >= reg_dt AND bbs_pst_oid < #{bbsPstOid} AND bbs_oid = #{bbsOid} AND open_yn = 'Y' AND ( bgng_dt IS NULL OR bgng_dt <= CURDATE() )
AND ( end_dt IS NULL OR end_dt >= CURDATE() )
ORDER BY bbs_pst_oid DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ${schema}.bbs_pst ( bbs_oid, user_oid, wrtr_nm, wrtr_pswd, bbs_pst_ttl, bbs_pst_cn, bbs_pst_cn_txt, ctgry, prvt_pst_yn,
bgng_dt,
end_dt,
ntc_yn, upend_fix_yn, stts, inq_cnt, up_bbs_pst_oid,
open_yn,
rcrt_type,
kwrd,
del_yn, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{bbsOid}, #{userOid}, #{wrtrNm}, ${schema}.fn_encrypt_sha1(#{wrtrPswd}), #{bbsPstTtl}, #{bbsPstCn}, #{bbsPstCnTxt}, #{ctgry}, #{prvtPstYn},
#{bgngDt},
#{endDt},
COALESCE(#{ntcYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{upendFixYn}, 'N'), #{stts}, COALESCE(#{inqCnt}, 0), #{upBbsPstOid},
#{openYn},
#{rcrtType},
#{kwrd},
COALESCE(#{delYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{regId}, 'portal'), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT tb.bbs_se_cd, tb.bbs_sub_se_cd, tbp.prvt_pst_yn FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst tbp INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs tb ON tb.bbs_oid = tbp.bbs_oid AND tb.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE tbp.bbs_pst_oid = #{bbsPstOid}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.bbs_pst SET bbs_oid = #{bbsOid}, user_oid = #{userOid},
wrtr_pswd = ${schema}.fn_encrypt_sha1(#{wrtrPswd}),
bbs_pst_ttl = #{bbsPstTtl}, bbs_pst_cn = #{bbsPstCn}, bbs_pst_cn_txt = #{bbsPstCnTxt}, ctgry = #{ctgry}, prvt_pst_yn = #{prvtPstYn}, ntc_yn = #{ntcYn},
upend_fix_yn = #{upendFixYn},
bgng_dt = #{bgngDt},
end_dt = #{endDt},
stts = #{stts},
open_yn = #{openYn},
rcrt_type = #{rcrtType},
kwrd = #{kwrd},
del_yn = 'N',
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = now() WHERE bbs_oid = #{bbsOid} AND bbs_pst_oid = #{bbsPstOid}
mapper.select: SELECT bbs_cmnt_oid, bbs_pst_oid, user_oid, bbs_cmnt_cn, wrtr_nm, wrtr_pswd, up_cmnt_oid, cmnt_lv, prvt_cmnt_yn, del_yn, del_dt, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_cmnt WHERE bbs_pst_oid = #{bbsPstOid} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY bbs_cmnt_oid ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.bbs_cmnt ( bbs_pst_oid, user_oid, bbs_cmnt_cn, wrtr_nm, reg_id ) VALUES ( #{bbsPstOid}, #{userOid}, #{bbsCmntCn}, #{wrtrNm}, 'potal' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.qna_dgstfn_evl WHERE tbl_nm = #{tblNm} AND tbl_oid = #{tblOid}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.qna_dgstfn_evl WHERE tbl_nm = #{tblNm} AND tbl_oid = #{tblOid} AND stts != 'PENDING'

SELECT tbp.bbs_pst_oid AS bbsPstOid, tbb.bbs_nm AS bbsNm, -- 게시구분 (생명윤리법QNA 등) tbp.ctgry, -- 문의구분
IF(qde.satisfaction IS NULL, '', IF(qde.satisfaction='LIKE', '만족', IF(qde.satisfaction='DISLIKE', '불만족', ''))) AS satisfaction, -- 만족도 IF(qde.satisfaction_date IS NULL, '', qde.satisfaction_date) AS satisfactionDate, -- 만족도 평가일 tbp.bbs_pst_ttl AS bbsPstTtl, -- 제목 DATE_FORMAT(tbp.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS questionDate, -- 질문일 (reg_dt) tbp.bbs_pst_cn_txt AS questionContent, -- 질문내용
ans_cn.reg_id AS answererId, -- 답변자 (답변 게시글 등록자 ID) ans_cn.bbs_pst_cn_txt AS answerContent, -- 답변내용 DATE_FORMAT(ans.first_reply_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draftDate, -- 초안작성일 (TEMP 최초 시점) DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS finalAnswerDate, -- 답변일 (COMP 최초 시점)
/* 소요일 계산 (초일불산입 + 휴일제외) */ -- [초안 소요일] IFNULL(GREATEST(0, DATEDIFF(ans.first_reply_dt, tbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(ans.first_reply_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0) ), 0) AS draftResponseWorkDays,
-- [최종 소요일] IFNULL(GREATEST(0, DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0) ), 0) AS finalResponseWorkDays
FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst tbp INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs tbb ON tbb.bbs_oid = tbp.bbs_oid
LEFT JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst ans_cn ON ans_cn.up_bbs_pst_oid = tbp.bbs_pst_oid AND ans_cn.del_yn = 'N'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT reply.up_bbs_pst_oid, MIN(tbh.reg_dt) AS first_reply_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_hstry tbh INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst reply ON tbh.tbl_oid = reply.bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbh.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbh.stts = 'TEMP' AND reply.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY reply.up_bbs_pst_oid ) ans ON tbp.bbs_pst_oid = ans.up_bbs_pst_oid
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT reply.up_bbs_pst_oid, MIN(tbh.reg_dt) AS final_comp_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_hstry tbh INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst reply ON tbh.tbl_oid = reply.bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbh.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbh.stts = 'COMP' AND reply.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY reply.up_bbs_pst_oid ) hist ON tbp.bbs_pst_oid = hist.up_bbs_pst_oid
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tbl_oid , chc AS satisfaction , mdfcn_dt AS satisfaction_date FROM ${schema}.qna_dgstfn_evl WHERE tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND stts = 'COMPLETED' ) qde ON tbp.bbs_pst_oid = qde.tbl_oid
tbp.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL -- 질문글만 대상
AND tbp.del_yn = #{delYn}
AND tbp.del_yn = 'N' AND tbp.open_yn = 'Y'
AND tbp.prvt_pst_yn = #{prvtPstYn}
AND tbp.reg_dt >= #{regStartDt}
AND tbp.reg_dt < DATE_ADD(#{regEndDt}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND tbp.bbs_oid = #{bbsOid}
AND tbp.ctgry = #{ctgry}
AND (
MATCH(tbp.bbs_pst_ttl) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)
MATCH(tbp.bbs_pst_cn_txt) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)
MATCH(tbp.bbs_pst_ttl) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) OR MATCH(tbp.bbs_pst_cn_txt) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)
)
GROUP BY tbp.bbs_pst_oid ORDER BY tbp.reg_dt DESC
